languages.text: "Как интересно. Мон-кай, не сумевшие подчинить мир себе, начали подчиняться законам планеты. Ваш вид удивительно упорен в собственном выживании".

traits.locale_text: "Как интересно. Мон-кай, не сумевшие подчинить мир себе, начали подчиняться законам планеты. Ваш вид удивительно упорен в собственном выживании".
traits.speaker: YrlietCompanion

languages.text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
languages.original_text: "Как интересно. Мон-кай, не сумевшие подчинить мир себе, начали подчиняться законам планеты. Ваш вид удивительно упорен в собственном выживании".

traits.locale_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have begun submitting to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
"How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have begun submitting to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
"How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
"How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."
"How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

languages.text: «Fascinante. Unos mon-keigh que no pudieron subyugar un planeta, obligados a someterse a las leyes del planeta. Tu especie es sorprendentemente tenaz a la hora de sobrevivir».
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: «Fascinante. Unos mon-keigh que no pudieron subyugar un planeta, obligados a someterse a las leyes del planeta. Tu especie es sorprendentemente tenaz a la hora de sobrevivir».

languages.text: “真有意思。一群无法征服世界的猴子，最终被迫臣服于这星球的法则。你们这个物种所具备的求生韧性当真了得。”
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: “真有意思。一群无法征服世界的猴子，最终被迫臣服于这星球的法则。你们这个物种所具备的求生韧性当真了得。”

languages.text: « Fascinant. Les mon-keigh n'ont pas pu se rendre maîtres de ce monde et ont été forcés de se soumettre aux lois de la planète. Votre espèce est remarquablement tenace quand il s'agit de sa survie. »
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: « Fascinant. Les mon-keigh n'ont pas pu se rendre maîtres de ce monde et ont été forcés de se soumettre aux lois de la planète. Votre espèce est remarquablement tenace quand il s'agit de sa survie. »

languages.text: "Ne büyüleyici. Bir dünyayı boyunduruk altına alamayan mon-keighler, bunun yerine gezegenin yasalarına boyun eğmek zorunda kalmış. Sizin türünüz hayatta kalma konusunda oldukça inatçı."
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: "Ne büyüleyici. Bir dünyayı boyunduruk altına alamayan mon-keighler, bunun yerine gezegenin yasalarına boyun eğmek zorunda kalmış. Sizin türünüz hayatta kalma konusunda oldukça inatçı."

languages.text: "Faszinierend. Chem-Pan-Sey, die eine Welt nicht unterjochen konnten, wurden stattdessen gezwungen, sich den Gesetzen des Planeten zu unterwerfen. Eure Spezies ist hinsichtlich ihres eigenes Überlebens ausgesprochen beharrlich."
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: "Faszinierend. Chem-Pan-Sey, die eine Welt nicht unterjochen konnten, wurden stattdessen gezwungen, sich den Gesetzen des Planeten zu unterwerfen. Eure Spezies ist hinsichtlich ihres eigenes Überlebens ausgesprochen beharrlich."

languages.text: 「実に興味深い。世界を支配できなかったモンケイグが、代わりに惑星の法則に従うことを強いられた。あなたの種族は、自らの生存のために驚くほど粘り強い。」
languages.original_text: "How fascinating. Mon-keigh who could not subjugate a world have been forced to submit to the planet's laws instead. Your species is remarkably tenacious in its own survival."

traits.locale_text: 「実に興味深い。世界を支配できなかったモンケイグが、代わりに惑星の法則に従うことを強いられた。あなたの種族は、自らの生存のために驚くほど粘り強い。」
